features.featureTitle: Add a Tinder-style profile card header to each economist's StatementSlide and EconomistRevealCard. Each card header should display the economist's name in large bold typography, a stylized avatar/portrait placeholder with a gradient backdrop, age or era label (e.g. '1883–1946'), and location/school of thought tag — all styled in the classic Tinder card layout (full-bleed image area at top, overlaid name/info at bottom-left in white text on a dark gradient).
